subcodes.first_line: O friend of old! Thy letter was received and, praised be God, it indicated serenity of soul and tranquility of conscience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست قدیم نامه شما رسید الحمد لله دلالت بر راحت جان و سلامت وجدان مینمود
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession
